recommendations.title: Gainsbourg: A Heroic Life
recommendations.overview: A glimpse at the life of French singer Serge Gainsbourg, from growing up in 1940s Nazi-occupied Paris through his successful song-writing years in the 1960s to his death in 1991 at the age of 62.

recommendations.title: The Lady in the Car with Glasses and a Gun
recommendations.overview: She’s the most beautiful, most short-sighted, most sentimental, most perplexing, most obstinate, most untrustworthy and most troubling of heroines. The lady in the car has never seen the sea. On the run from the police, she keeps telling herself that

recommendations.title: Kahlil Gibran's The Prophet
recommendations.overview: Exiled artist and poet Mustafa embarks on a journey home with his housekeeper and her daughter; together the trio must evade the authorities who fear that the truth in Mustafa's words will incite rebellion.
recommendations.director: Roger Allers, Bill Plympton, Mohammad Saeed Harib, Tomm Moore, Nina Paley, Joan C. Gratz, Michał Socha, Joann Sfar, Paul Brizzi, Gaëtan Brizzi

recommendations.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
recommendations.overview: In a world where walking, talking, digitally connected bots have become children's best friends, an 11-year-old finds that his robot buddy doesn't quite work the same as the others do.

recommendations.title: The Cat Returns
recommendations.overview: Young Haru rescues a cat from being run over, but soon learns it's no ordinary feline; it happens to be the Prince of the Cats.

recommendations.title: Top Cat Begins
recommendations.overview: Top Cat and his new feline friend hatch a scheme to steal from the fearful Mr. Big.

recommendations.title: Two Worlds
recommendations.overview: A French tradesman travels in time and liberates an oppressed tribe in another world.

recommendations.title: Three from Prostokvashino
recommendations.overview: Little Fedor brings a cat to home despite his mother's distaste for cats. He runs away with his talking cat, to make more friends on the way.

recommendations.title: Felidae
recommendations.overview: A domestic house cat named Francis investigates the grisly feline murders taking place in his new neighborhood.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.
